calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-440 noisy-selection-head propagation falsifier: does NoisyNet weight noise carve committed-action diversity above a matched-pre-commit-variance temperature control (the 687 control), on the 569i top-k + MECH-448 demotion SOTA stack? (loop-seg OFF vs ON disambiguates injection-site vs single-arena/ARC-110)
items.note: diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING. Routed by cpkt_tonic_exploration_noise_build_decision_2026-06-27 (MECH-440 substrate built + landed ree-v3 a65609b). 4 arms (A0_OFF / ARM_TEMP=687 matched-pre-commit-variance temperature control / ARM_NOISE_SINGLE / ARM_NOISE_LOOPSEG) on the matched SOTA conversion stack; only swept factor = exploration-injection site. PRIMARY DV committed-action-class entropy; SECONDARY pre-commit sampling-class entropy (thrash-vs-carve). C1 ARM_NOISE_SINGLE committed strict-above ARM_TEMP -> supports MECH-440; if not C1 but ARM_NOISE_LOOPSEG converts -> injection-site fix gated on ARC-110 (route /implement-substrate); if neither -> single-arena collapse subsumes the locus -> weakens + route ARC-110. dacc_max_suppression>0 + both-arms-raise-precommit + supra-floor noise-bias non-vacuity preconditions self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue. Coordinate (no duplicate) with the empirical 687-successor (GAP-C leg) + the 705/706 curiosity lineage. Sibling harness V3-EXQ-707 (ARC-110 validation, prio 400 runs first). Smoke: dry-run PASS 2026-06-27.
